body.title: Post CC inbox alert when OR balance drops below threshold
body.result: _maybe_alert() posts to channel when balance < OR_BUDGET_ALERT_USD (default $15); 6h dedup stamp; no TheIgors imports; 18 tests
body.description:
OR balance is at $41 burning at $6/day (~7 days remaining as of 2026-05-18). There's no automated alert when balance gets critically low — CC only finds out by manually checking. Add a threshold check that posts to the CC inbox when balance drops below a configurable floor (default $15).

The balance is already fetched hourly by budget_gate.py during inference calls. Add a post-fetch check: if balance crosses below threshold and hasn't alerted in the last 6h, post to cc_inbox_bridge (or directly to the channel).

**Affected files:** devices/inference/budget_gate.py, new devices/inference/budget_alert.py or inline in _write_balance_history()
**Design rules:** no-TheIgors-imports; alert dedup via a simple timestamp file (no DB needed)
**Scope boundary:** alert only, no automatic throttling of inference. Threshold configurable via OR_BUDGET_ALERT_USD env var (default 15.0). One alert per 6h max to avoid spam.
**Test plan:** (1) alert fires when balance < threshold, (2) alert deduped within 6h window, (3) no alert when balance above threshold.
